metadata.seo_title: Penalti en fútbol: cuándo se pita y cómo se ejecuta
metadata.meta_description: El penalti en fútbol explicado. Faltas dentro del área, ejecución desde los once metros, defensa del portero y casos especiales según las reglas IFAB.

quality_journey.research: Read Law 14 (procedure, encroachment table, offences/sanctions) + Law 1 (penalty mark position) + VAR protocol (reviewable categories) from IFAB Laws of the Game 2025/26
quality_journey.draft_pass: Generated 1875-word draft following rules_template.md structure adapted for sub-rule article: H1, deck, intro (3p), 6 H2 body sections, FAQ (6 H3), closing related article line
quality_journey.critique_pass_1: Score 76 — REVISE_REQUIRED. Failures: (1) density of <strong> tags dropped sharply in second half (paras 13-32 had 0-2 strongs vs target 6-7), (2) cinco párrafos rozando 71-74 palabras, (3) one cliché-leaning line about 'veladas de Champions' in the rebound paragraph
quality_journey.revise_pass_1: Applied 3 priority fixes: (1) added strong tags across 15+ paragraphs to bring density into target band, (2) trimmed long paragraphs to ≤68 words (max now 71), (3) replaced the 'veladas de Champions' line with sober description of the second-touch sanction (tiro libre indirecto)
quality_journey.critique_pass_2: Score 91 — PASS. Anti-hallucination PASS. 15/15 checklist points green
quality_journey.fact_check: 13 concrete claims verified against IFAB Laws of the Game 2025/26 text (specific lines cited per claim). 0 claims corrected. 0 claims softened. No numerical conversion-rate statistics included (no source). Panenka mentioned only as technique name, not attributed to specific match
